originalAlarm.description: Value stored to 'thisopt' is never read

reasoning: 1a3c8e3d840.c L13: 'thisopt = SSL_PROTOCOL_TLSV1_1' dead store. thisopt is assigned inside 'if (rand() % 2)' but never read afterward (function returns without using thisopt). PC=HAVE_TLSV1_X=T correctly constrains when SSL_PROTOCOL_TLSV1_1 is defined (only compilable config for this file). No library macros. New bug. Consistent with TRANSFORMATION_147 (TRUE_NEW_OVER with restrictive !_STDLIB_H); PRODUCT version is correctly constrained.
